description: Clean the recipe experiment data, normalize ratings, and calculate weighted composite scores to identify the optimal chocolate chip cookie ingredient combinations. Save the results to the output directory.

natural_language.prompt: Analyze 20 chocolate chip cookie experiments with inconsistent data. Clean ingredient names, normalize ratings to 0-10 scale, create weighted composite score (taste 40%, texture 30%, ease 20%, cost 10%), identify top 3 combinations, flag invalid experiments, and calculate category averages.
